role_description: Pipe fitter foreman responsible for supervising a crew of journeymen and helpers on industrial construction or refinery projects. Manages daily work assignments, reads and interprets isometrics and P&IDs, ensures weld quality and code compliance, coordinates with welding inspectors and NDE crews, tracks material and consumable usage, manages test packs, and reports crew progress to the general foreman or superintendent.
report_focus: When structuring this person's reports, look for: crew status and headcount, work assignments given, spools installed, welds completed and accepted/rejected, NDE status, material needs, test pack progress, coordination with other trades, quality issues, safety observations, schedule impacts, and plans for tomorrow.
